name: telegram-admin-bot
description: Wire up a Telegram bot for SaaS admin: daily reports, interactive webhook menu, new-user notifications, broadcast messages. Covers webhook security (secret token + allowlist), HTML parse_mode (never MarkdownV2), html.escape() for dynamic values, inline keyboard menus with editMessageText, and the common breakage points.
